# COB-641 · API - Review - Facturar Remitos / Órdenes de Compra -> Error al intentar generar la factura

[COB-641 en Jira](https://bluinc.atlassian.net/browse/COB-641)

## Descripción

1. Al intentar generar una factura aparece un error de SQL.



```
curl 'https://gamma.api.cashbox.lio.red/v1/afipPurchases/orders/17995/invoice' \
  -X POST \
  -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:151.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/151.0' \
  -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'Accept-Language: es-MX' \
  -H 'Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..cDiEPq8pr6hDhMKQ_FDWbDYX0kTgCLUIAq4jJhf0ft0' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Origin: https://gamma.caja.saftel.com' \
  -H 'Connection: keep-alive' \
  -H 'Referer: https://gamma.caja.saftel.com/' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors' \
  -H 'Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site' \
  --data-raw '{"csufac":"1913","dfecfac":"2026-05-29","dfeccont":null,"ccodpago":"CO","cnumsucpag":null,"ccodalm":"DOM","ccoddiv":"DOL","nvaldiv":1,"ntipocomp":1,"observation":"Gprueba1914","lines":[{"cref":"121957","cdetalle":"VGA MSI GEFORCE RTX3050 VENTUS 2X 6G OC","npreunit":200,"ncanent":50,"niva":10.5,"ndto":5},{"cref":"122180","cdetalle":"MB MSI INTEL (LGA 1700) PRO H610M-S DDR4","npreunit":49,"ncanent":200,"niva":21,"ndto":10}],"taxes":[{"ccodimp":"IBG","cdescrip":"IIBB SANTIAGO","nporctasa":100,"nimpbase":15}]}'
```
